login.title: Your Managed Dropshipping Dashboard
login.footer: Your email must be linked to an active license.
login.errorNoEmail: Google account has no email. Please try again.
login.errorNoLicense: No license found for this email. Contact your account manager.

language.title: Choose Language
language.subtitle: Sprache wählen
language.footer: You can change the language later in settings.

tour.welcomeDesc: Let us give you a quick overview of what awaits you.
tour.stepNavDesc: Find all sections here: Home, Charts, Themes, Legal & Profile.
tour.stepChartsDesc: Monthly top products with analytics, trend scores, and 1-click import.
tour.stepThemesDesc: Install professional Shopify themes with one click.
tour.stepProfileDesc: Manage Shopify connection, brand kit, and legal data.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Your Shopify connection, brand identity, and legal data.
profile.shopDomainHint: The domain is set via the connection process.
profile.brandKitDesc: Your brand identity for AI-generated texts and theme customization.
profile.tonePlaceholder: e.g. Casual, modern, Gen-Z, with emojis...
profile.legalDesc: This data is used for the DACH compliance package.

charts.title: Winning Product Charts
charts.subtitle: The best dropshipping products with rankings, analytics & 1-click import.
charts.noShopifyDesc: 1-click import disabled. Connect your shop in settings.
charts.noProductsDesc: Your Winning Product Charts will appear here.
charts.proTipDesc: Remember – the most popular products often have the highest competition. Look for niches!
charts.aiNote: AI optimization uses DeepSeek AI (3x per month available)
charts.copyDsers: Copy the link and paste it into DSers:
